description.ko: 화산재와 돌이 다져져 묻힌 열기와 침식, 시간을 품은 건조한 지형도로 드러난다.
description.en: Volcanic ash and stone compact into a dry relief map of buried heat, erosion, and time.

prompt: TERRA-1, titled "The Tuff Horizon Index." A hyper-detailed photoreal geological texture study of a fractured volcanic-ash tuff slab exposed at ground level, viewed close and slightly oblique so the broken face reads as a rugged relief map carved from compacted earth. Fine ash laminae bend around embedded pumice chips, feldspar grit, and flattened lapilli, forming uneven elevation bands instead of straight strata. Deep #8B4513 umber ash fills compressed low channels, #D2691E rust-orange oxide stains the raised fracture lips, #F4A460 sandy tan dust softens worn ledges, and muted #2F4F4F slate mineral patches settle inside vesicles, hairline joints, and cooled pressure seams. The surface should feel heavy, dry, and ancient: rough rock pores, gritty soil crumbs, snapped sediment skins, granular abrasion, small shadowed hollows, and contour-like ridges shaped by burial, heat, erosion, and time. Low natural grazing light, grounded earthy mood, medium drifting dust, no sky, no vegetation, no water, no human objects.
